records.ety: [F. idoltrie, LL. idolatria, L. idololatria, Fr. Gr. <?/; <?/ idol + <?/ service.]

defs: The worship of idols, images, or anything which is not God; the worship of false gods.
quotes: His eye surveyed the dark idolatries Of alienated Judah.

defs: Excessive attachment or veneration for anything; respect or love which borders on adoration.
